title: Girlfriend of Steel 2
wikitext:
[]: Girlfriend of Steel 2             Quote Post by Darius » Mon Aug 21, 2006 7:21 pm Hey guys...when i'm searching to find Girlfriend of steel 2...I can't find it..my friends can't find it and ya...It's tedious But, I keep hearing bad things about it from many people and that it's mostly pictures..Taking that into consideration, I looked for that and learned of Reichu's compiled collection thingy...But, noone was seeding the torrent so I couldn't get it.. If anyone can tell me how to get the game or the pictures..that would be most appreciated...and if I can't play the game in English...then I suppose i'll try to study Kanji from my Japanese book or...just be fine with the pictures lol And I apologize in advance if there was already a thread about this. Oh and since this thread is talking about the game in general...feel free to talk about anyhting you want about it. Darius.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Aug 21, 2006 8:23 pm I'd think getting the manga is better. Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 21, 2006 8:51 pm Since this theard is up, I have a question about the manga. I only have what was released in Newtype of it (my stepbrother gave me those issues) as well as volumes 1-3 downloaded (which I haven't really had time to read yet, just skimmed thru.) but for those who've read US released volumes 1 and 2, would you say it's worth it? I generally like romantic-comedy stories anyway, so I don't think "Marmalade Eva" (that's what first comes to my mind as opposed to "Love Eva") would disappoint. Even if the series ends with a Shinji/Rei pairing, the journry of getting there sounds fun. (though if the whole thing ends afterward with Shinji waking up on the beach, I'm gonna be screaming WTF! :shock: ) Some things I'm wondering about though: Spoilers below? ~Is Kaworu-kun the final Angel? It kinda seems like he is... Ugh, I can only imagine how much it'll suck if Shinji has to kill his best buddy again. ~Is Rei just a normal girl, as opposed to being a clone? (of Lilith and Yui) According to a later chapter in the series, she was an experiment to create an artifical Eva pilot??? ~How the hell are the Evas (espeically Unit 01) around if Yui is acutally alive and well? ~Similar to above: how are the ANGELS around if 2nd (and 1st?) Impact didn't seem to occur in this world? ~Is Asuka living with her acutal mom and her dad? If that's the case, why is her last name Langely-Soryu instead of just Soryu? ~What is Ritsuko on, telling Shinji "I like your father very much"? Last one's a comment: ~Seems like Shinji can't get a break. Even in his "perfect world" with his mom and dad together, he has issues with Gendou! ;

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Tue Aug 22, 2006 10:59 am ZeroFive1 wrote: I'd think getting the manga is better. Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by Derek » Fri Oct 27, 2006 2:51 pm Don't worry Darius you'll get it someday..... ANYWAY ITS TIME FOR TOGO PARTY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! PUT SOME TECHNO MUSIC TJ!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! AROUND THE WORLD, AROUND THE WORRRRRRRRLD!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! *whisper**Oh and while your at it put some Bob Marley....*

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Oct 27, 2006 4:50 pm Rachael has a walk through somewhere, I think they are indeed sleeping together, but I'm not a hundred percent sure... I personally like the manga, though the manga character designs suck. I also have the game some where, I'll see if I can dig it out. And the mostly talking thing... Well I have the Ai Yori Aoshi game, and it's pretty much like that. I have a feeling that most Japanese romantic comedy games are like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Oct 28, 2006 7:33 am The walkthrough is over on Gamfaqs
